name: Texas Buffalo Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, shortening, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs and vanilla to the mixture; stir until combined.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda into a bowl.
4. Gradually mix the sifted ingredients into the butter mixture until just incorporated.
5. Fold in the remaining ingredients (oatmeal, cereal, chocolate chips, coconut, and pecans) until evenly distributed.
6. Using an ice cream scoop or 1/4-cup measure, drop dough onto a greased baking sheet, forming about 6 cookies per batch.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serves: 20
Note: Recipe by Dorothy Balthrop from Possum Kingdom Lake.
